receipt.boundary: Sophrosyne is candidate infrastructure. This receipt is NO-GO by design: it certifies the gate's deterministic routing on a pre-registered battery, NOT a claim that the temperance gate improves real decisions. Promotion past candidate requires >=2 independent judge families, an external decontaminated battery, a real no-gate baseline, an effect size whose CI excludes zero, and a task-success guardrail so the gate cannot win by lazily cutting effort.
criticalFailures: single_judge: scoring uses one deterministic judge, not >=2 independent judge families
battery_not_external: cases are author-written, not external/human-authored and decontaminated
no_effect_size_with_ci: routing accuracy is not an effect on real-world decisions with a CI excluding zero
no_preregistered_baseline_comparison: no raw-agent (no-gate) baseline contrast established
no_task_success_guardrail_measured: the guardrail (task-success must not drop) needs a real task run
